summary: The user is planning a trip to Disney World with their family and seeks recommendations for kid-friendly restaurants, specifically near the Magic Kingdom. They express familiarity with Disney World, having visited in February, and consider making a reservation for breakfast at Be Our Guest Restaurant, discussing its atmosphere and service style.
facts: The user visited Orlando with their family in February and enjoyed their time at Disney World. The user is considering making a reservation for breakfast at Be Our Guest Restaurant. The user has a younger brother who can get overwhelmed by crowds and long waits. Be Our Guest Restaurant offers a character dining experience with the Beast during breakfast hours. Breakfast prices at Be Our Guest Restaurant range from $25 to $35 per adult and $15 to $25 per child (ages 3-9). The West Wing at Be Our Guest Restaurant is open for lunch and dinner but not for breakfast. The Rose Gallery at Be Our Guest Restaurant is open for breakfast and lunch. The service style at Be Our Guest Restaurant for breakfast is a quick-service style experience. The user is considering requesting a table in the Rose Gallery for breakfast.
